ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the housing record */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specific house or property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, multi-family, apartment) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovation" INTEGER /* Year of the last major renovation */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the property owner */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Whether the property is for rent, for sale, or owner-occupied */,
  "rental_price" REAL /* Rental price per month (if applicable) */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price (if applicable) */,
  "date_of_sale" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "date_of_lease" TEXT /* Date the property was last leased */,
  "maintenance_records" TEXT /* Notes on maintenance and repair history */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of Black residents */,
  "lstat" REAL /* Percentage of lower status of the population */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weighting for observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic record */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the area */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups (e.g., 0-18, 19-35, 36-60, 60+) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnic groups */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels (e.g., high school, college, graduate) */,
  "health_indicators" TEXT /* General health indicators (e.g., average life expectancy, obesity rate) */,
  "transportation_access" TEXT /* Access to public transportation (e.g., bus, subway, bike lanes) */,
  "community_services" TEXT /* Availability of community services (e.g., parks, libraries, schools) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy came into effect */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "policy_category" TEXT /* Category of the policy (e.g., housing, environment, infrastructure) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy (e.g., proposed, active, expired) */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of the policy's impact */,
  "public_support" TEXT /* Level of public support for the policy */,
  "stakeholders" TEXT /* Key stakeholders involved in the policy */,
  "implementation_steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps for implementing the policy */,
  "monitoring_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used to monitor the policy's effectiveness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for environmental factor record */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index rating */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level in decibels */,
  "green_space_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of green space to urban area */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index rating */,
  "pollutant_levels" TEXT /* Levels of specific pollutants (e.g., lead, mercury) */,
  "waste_management" TEXT /* Waste management practices in the area */,
  "climate_change_impact" TEXT /* Impact of climate change on the area */,
  "sustainability_initiatives" TEXT /* Ongoing sustainability initiatives */,
  "energy_consumption" TEXT /* Energy consumption patterns (e.g., renewable energy use) */,
  "biodiversity" TEXT /* Biodiversity in the area (e.g., types of flora and fauna) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
